title: Insights

subtitleNoData: Patterns and correlations from your drives.
notEnoughHint: Tripatlas keeps collecting — once more drives are recorded, an analysis will appear here.

speed.subtitle: Effective speed (distance ÷ drive duration). High speed drives up consumption.
